fields.body200: Achieve results faster and maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions with our training and services packages.

fields.heading: Scope
fields.body: BeyondTrust Professional Services will work with you to ensure your services engagement is designed to meet your specific use case needs.

fields.heading: Train
fields.body: BeyondTrust University training will equip you to understand, administer, and get the most value from your solutions.

fields.heading: Kickoff
fields.body: Your BeyondTrust Professional Services project team will meet with you and key stakeholders to confirm project scope and understand use cases.

fields.heading: Implement
fields.body: BeyondTrust Engineers or Architects will work to install, configure, and deploy your BeyondTrust solutions aligned to your criteria.

fields.heading: Maintain
fields.body: BeyondTrust Support is available via email, chat, phone, or the Customer Portal to assist you with any issues that arise after your project has completed.

fields.body250: Achieve tangible results and improve your security posture sooner with services packages designed to get your solutions up and running more quickly.

fields.heading: Implementations
fields.body: Deploy solutions faster using our expertise based on thousands of successful deployments.

fields.heading: Upgrade/Migrations
fields.body: Bring your deployment up to date with assisted upgrades and migrations from previous software versions.

fields.heading: Health Checks
fields.body: Identify opportunities to improve security and usability as the needs of your business evolve.

fields.body250: Accelerate your technical and professional learning experience with role-based product training.

fields.heading: Success Included
fields.body: Complimentary self-paced eLearning, designed to kickstart your success with BeyondTrust.

fields.heading: Success Elevated
fields.body: Flexible self-paced training, expert-led sessions, and hands-on labs to elevate skills, confidence, and results.

fields.heading: Private Training
fields.body: Instructor-led training that is offered live either on-site at your location or as a virtual course; will only include your company's participants.

fields.body250: Benefit from a dedicated technical resource who will partner with you to gain an in-depth knowledge of your BeyondTrust environment and overall business operations.

fields.heading: Standard
fields.body: A basic level of service for access to Subject Matter Expertise (SME).

fields.heading: Enterprise
fields.body: An enhanced level of service for more SME access and upgrade assistance.

fields.heading: Strategic
fields.body: A highly-available level of service for SME access, upgrade assistance, and an annual training budget.

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: Achieve results faster and maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions with our training and services packages.

fields.body200: Accelerate your technical and professional learning experience with role-based product training.
fields.label: Log in to BeyondTrust University

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Discover everything BeyondTrust University has to offer and expand your expertise through our flexible training options — including self-paced online courses, instructor-led training, and more!

fields.heading: Online courses available at no extra cost
fields.body: Our complimentary self-paced eLearning, designed to kickstart your success with BeyondTrust.

fields.heading: Curated training subscription with elevated, blended learning
fields.body: Master your product knowledge with expert-led administrative training, labs, workshops, and certification!

fields.heading: Instructor-led training tailored to your needs
fields.body: Interactive learning journey guided by expert instructors in sessions personalized for your company.

fields.heading: Your achievement certified and on display
fields.body: Validate your knowledge and boost your credibility with industry-recognized certifications designed to help you stand out and advance your career.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Compare your options and understand which training program is right for you. For further inquiries about our training options, reach out to your account representative or btu@beyondtrust.com.

rows: Explore our diverse list of self-paced eLearning courses for every BT solution.
Monitor and measure learner advancement with real-time insights into course completion and performance.
Earn Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits to maintain your professional requirements while expanding your knowledge base.
Follow structured, role-based learning journeys designed to build essential administrator skills from foundational to advanced levels.
Participate in interactive, expert-led sessions that combine instruction, discussion, and real-world exercises for immediate skill application.
Gain practical experience through guided, virtualized lab environments that reinforce key concepts and skills.
Easily reassign or transfer training seats every 6 months to accommodate shifting team needs and schedules.
Validate your expertise and demonstrate your professional achievement through industry-recognized certification exams.
Demonstrate your progress and validate your skills through a dynamic certification exam.
Engage directly with BeyondTrust University instructors in a structured, virtual learning environment for in-depth guidance and personalized feedback.
Bring expert-led training to your location for a structured, collaborative learning experience tailored to your team’s goals. **Travel restrictions may apply

fields.question: Who do I contact if I want to inquire more about BeyondTrust University?
fields.answer: If you are interested in learning more about our training programs, reach out to your account representative. If you do not know your representative, please fill out the form here and add “BeyondTrust University” into the message box. Someone will reach out to you after the submission.

fields.question: What browsers are supported at BeyondTrust University?
fields.answer: BeyondTrust University recommends using Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, or Safari for an optimal training experience.

fields.question: If my contact information or training access is inaccurate, how do I resolve this?
How do I access BeyondTrust University?
fields.answer: To access BeyondTrust University (BTU), you must have a BeyondTrust Customer Service Portal account. Once your account is created, you will be able to access BeyondTrust University along with all other available BeyondTrust resources.

fields.question: Where can I find documentation or additional learning materials?
fields.answer:
BeyondTrust offers extensive learning resources designed to support your ongoing development. The additional training opportunities are outlined below.

**A BeyondTrust account is required to access most of the resources listed below.

  • BeeKeepers Community
  • BT Knowledge Base
  • BT Resource Center
  • BT Technical Documentation

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: Accelerate your technical and professional learning experience with role-based product training.

fields.body200: Achieve tangible results and improve your security posture sooner with services packages designed to get your solutions up and running quickly and optimized over time.

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: Achieve tangible results and improve your security posture sooner with services packages designed to get your solutions up and running quickly.

fields.body200: Partner with a trusted advisor and advocate within BeyondTrust who is uniquely positioned to provide a proactive approach to the support and ongoing operation of your investment.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
BeyondTrust enterprise technical account managers (TAMs) are technical resources who will partner with you to gain an in-depth knowledge of your BeyondTrust environment, technical accounts, and overall business operations. Your BeyondTrust TAM will become your trusted advisor and advocate within BeyondTrust and is uniquely positioned to provide a proactive approach to the support and ongoing operation of your BeyondTrust investment.

Use the following chart to compare your options and to help guide your decision on which TAM service tier is right for you.

rows: TAMs act as a single point of contact for all technical items, enhancing existing support
Review of all open support incidents
TAMs monitor feature requests and provide updates to customers as needed
Act as an escalation point for new and existing tickets, driving resolution internally
Provide a notification of product updates and announcements
Configuration of an environment profile for streamlined support

Product assessments reviews are conducted by TAMs to analyze current usage, capture current state of production adoption and enables quicker time to value on new features and provides our customers with opportunities to establish goals for advance product utilization
Coordination of software upgrades to existing deployments. Product specific, utilizing internal process to inform support teams of pending customer upgrades

TAM would participate in upgrade during scheduled timeframe to ensure smooth upgrade, and ability to pull in additional resources as necessary.  Product specific, including after-hours, must be pre-scheduled
Enhancing existing support services by being more deeply involved in day-to-day operations
Up to two tickets for access to our Go Beyond user conference (T&E not included)
Performed annually (within annual subscription).  Depth of health check is determined on a per product basis
Up to two public training courses
On-site review and touch point (may be coordinated with a Health Check, Technical Product Assessment

Upgrade AssistanceTAM would participate in upgrade during scheduled timeframe to ensure smooth upgrade, and ability to pull in additional resources as necessary. Product specific, including after-hours, must be pre-scheduledNoYesYes

Go Beyond AccessUp to two tickets for access to our Go Beyond user conference (T&E not included)NoNoYes
